docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANTA, VENKATA
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VENUE IS IMPROPER.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. (SUBMITTED ON SC-150 FORM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANTA, VENKATA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-03-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VENKATA GHANTA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT YASMINE ASHURAEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S GRANTED REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NOV-03-2022 HEARING. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, UPDATING COURT WITH DEFENDANT'S CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANTA, VENKATA
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-04-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANTA, VENKATA
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED OCT-17-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASHURAEY, YASMINE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VENKATA GHANTA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM (UNAUTHORIZED). DEFENDANT YASMINE ASHURAEY IS NOT PRESENT. SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT IS NOT THE PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CLAIM. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON OCTOBER 24, 2022 IS NOT VALID SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED IN ARKANSAS. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT OUT OF STATE SERVICE IS ALLOWED ONLY ON MOTOR VEHICLE/ACCIDENT AND LANDLORD /TENANT CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO INFORMED THAT THE CORRECT VENUE FOR HIS CLAIM WOULD BE THAT STATE THE DEFENDANT CURRENTLY RESIDES IN. PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED THAT HIS EXHIBTS THAT HE PREVIOUSLY SENT TO COURT BE DESTROYED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GHANTA, VENKATA AS TO DEFENDANT ASHURAEY, YASMINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
